command: uv run python scripts/train_dense_decoder.py --corpus-jsonl data/hf_mirror/exploratory_d5_balanced/corpus.jsonl --corpus-record results/D5_hf_balanced_200m_materialization.json --tokenizer-json artifacts/D5_fast_bpe_8192_seed123/tokenizer.json --device rocm --seq-len 128 --hidden-dim 528 --layers 3 --heads 8 --batch-size 2 --steps 19532 --validation-batches 512 --gradient-accumulation-steps 1 --mixed-precision fp32 --learning-rate 0.0001 --optimizer-name adamw --attention-mask-mode finite_causal --progress-interval 5000 --checkpoint-interval 5000 --architecture-variant dense --adapter-dim 0 --validation-seed 424242 --block-impl explicit_causal --max-documents 0 --max-file-bytes 256000 --output-dir artifacts/D5_bpe8192_dense528_seed123_5m_equal_compute --output results/D5_bpe8192_dense528_seed123_5m_equal_compute.json --experiment-id D5_bpe8192_dense528_seed123_5m_equal_compute --seed 123
notes: Initial configurable dense decoder training smoke from random initialization on the filtered local repository corpus. This validates the pipeline only; it is not the required 10-50M parameter or 50M-token run.
